--- !bad_empty_properties.sql
(a {})

--- Error
syntax error: testdata/input/gql_graph_pattern/!bad_empty_properties.sql:1:5: expected token: <ident>, but: }
  1|  (a {})
   |      ^


--- AST
&ast.BadGQLGraphPattern{
  BadNode: &ast.BadNode{
    NodeEnd: 6,
    Tokens:  []*token.Token{
      &token.Token{
        Kind: "(",
        Raw:  "(",
        End:  1,
      },
      &token.Token{
        Kind:     "<ident>",
        Raw:      "a",
        AsString: "a",
        Pos:      1,
        End:      2,
      },
      &token.Token{
        Kind:  "{",
        Space: " ",
        Raw:   "{",
        Pos:   3,
        End:   4,
      },
      &token.Token{
        Kind: "}",
        Raw:  "}",
        Pos:  4,
        End:  5,
      },
      &token.Token{
        Kind: ")",
        Raw:  ")",
        Pos:  5,
        End:  6,
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
(a {})
